attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  SSOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
   SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE   AS BK_SOL_HOLD_DATETIME,
   GCOHD.NAME      AS BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME,
   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
   SCOOHA.CREATED_BY    AS CREATED_BY_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG = 'Y' OR GCOHR.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RELEASED_ROLE,
   NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  AS SS_CD,
   SCOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID   AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
   SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY   AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='Y' THEN SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ELSE GCOHR.CREATION_DATE END AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DATETIME,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' ELSE GCOHR.RELEASE_REASON_CODE END AS RU_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_REASON_CD,
   USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
         SCOOHA.CREATE_DATETIME AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_HOLD_CRTD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
         COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_HOLD_UPD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
         SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE1 AS SALES_LINE_HOLD_REASON_TXT ,
   CASE WHEN GCOHR.HOLD_RELEASE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')  ELSE NULL END AS SOL_HOLD_RLSD_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
   NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS DD_SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='Y' THEN CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) ELSE SCOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID END AS RU_SK_HOLD_RELEASE_ID_INT,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='Y' THEN CAST( SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE ) 
   ELSE CAST(GCOHR.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) END  AS RU_DV_SOL_HOLD_RELEASE_DT,
   CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS DV_SOL_HOLD_DT,
 CAST(CAST(SCOOHA.HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT  AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YY')  AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') as SOL_HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
 COALESCE(GCOHSA.HOLD_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') AS HOLD_COMMENT,
   CASE WHEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='Y' THEN 'DELETED_IN_SOURCE' ELSE COALESCE(GCOHR.RELEASE_COMMENT,'UNKNOWN') END AS RELEASE_COMMENT
 FROM  
  $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_LINE_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SCOOHA
   INNER JOIN 
    (
   $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT  NSOL 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSOL.SS_CD
    )
   ON ( SCOOHA.LINE_ID=NSOL.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT 
   AND SCOOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOL.EP_HEADER_ID_INT 
      AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME )
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SSOLH
   ON ( SCOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = SSOLH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT 
     AND SCOOHA.LINE_ID=SSOLH.SK_LINE_ID_INT 
     AND SSOLH.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
   INNER JOIN 
    ($$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_SOURCES_ALL GCOHSA
     INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_DEFINITIONS GCOHD ON (GCOHD.HOLD_ID = GCOHSA.HOLD_ID)
    )
   ON (SCOOHA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID = GCOHSA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID)
   LEFT JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_RELEASES GCOHR 
   ON(SCOOHA.HOLD_RELEASE_ID = GCOHR.HOLD_RELEASE_ID)
 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT
 CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
 EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
 , EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
 FROM 
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER  NEU
   ON
    NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
 ) EFU_CR
 ON
 EFU_CR.USER_ID = SCOOHA.CREATED_BY
 AND
 EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME                 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT 
 CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
 EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
 EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER  NEU
   ON
    NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
 ) EFU_UPD
 ON
 EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
 AND
 EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE  SCOOHA.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT
 ORDER_HOLD_ID ,
 ATTRIBUTE1 ,
 CREATION_DATE ,
 HEADER_ID ,
 HOLD_RELEASE_ID ,
 HOLD_SOURCE_ID ,
 LINE_ID ,
 HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT ,
 CREATED_BY ,
 LAST_UPDATED_BY ,
 LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
 ORG_ID ,
 GLOBAL_NAME ,
 CREATE_DATETIME ,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
 FROM 
 $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_LINE_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SCOOHA
 WHERE SCOOHA.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
 AND SCOOHA.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG  = 'N'
 AND(
NOT EXISTS
  (
  SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT  NSOL
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSOL.SS_CD
  WHERE SCOOHA.LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT AND  SCOOHA.HEADER_ID = NSOL.EP_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME 
  )
  OR NOT EXISTS
  (SELECT 1 FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_SOURCES_ALL GCOHSA  
  WHERE SCOOHA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID=GCOHSA.HOLD_SOURCE_ID
  AND GCOHSA.HOLD_ID IN (SELECT HOLD_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_HOLD_DEFINITIONS )
   )
   OR NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SMOLH
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
   ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMOLH.SS_CODE
   WHERE 
   SCOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID  = SMOLH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT          
   AND SCOOHA.LINE_ID = SMOLH.SK_LINE_ID_INT     
   AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME= SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
  )
  )

SELECT 
ORDER_HOLD_ID,
HEADER_ID,
LINE_ID,
HOLD_SOURCE_ID,
HOLD_RELEASE_ID,
'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
ATTRIBUTE1,
ATTRIBUTE2 ,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ORG_ID,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CASE WHEN SOURCE_DML_TYPE ='DELETE'  THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG	
FROM
$$NRTSTGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORD_HOLDS_ALL_HLDNRT  SCOOHAN
WHERE SCOOHAN.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
 ORDER_HOLD_ID
 ,HEADER_ID
 ,LINE_ID
 ,HOLD_SOURCE_ID
 ,HOLD_RELEASE_ID
 ,GLOBAL_NAME
 ,CREATE_DATETIME
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) UPDATE_DATETIME
 ,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
 ,ATTRIBUTE1
 ,HOLD_AUTO_RELEASE_DT_TXT
 ,CREATED_BY
 ,CREATION_DATE
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE
 ,ORG_ID
 , USER AS  EDW_UPDATE_USER
 ,'N' SOURCE_DELETED_FLG
 FROM
 $$EXCEPDB.EX_OE_ORDER_HOLDS_ALL_NRT ECOOHA
 WHERE ECOOHA.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL 
 AND EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_LINE_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SCOOHA
     WHERE SCOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID = ECOOHA.ORDER_HOLD_ID
      AND SCOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME = ECOOHA.GLOBAL_NAME
      )

SELECT 
 RANK() OVER 
 (ORDER BY 
 STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT, 
 STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD)  +  SMHLD_ORD_MAX.MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY,
 STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT,
 STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_LINE_ID_INT,
 STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD,
 USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM
 FROM
 (
 SELECT DISTINCT
 SCOOHL.ORDER_HOLD_ID  AS SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT ,
 SCOOHL.LINE_ID AS SK_LINE_ID_INT,
 NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD
 FROM 
 $$NRTSTGDB.WI_ORDER_LINE_HOLDS_ALL_NRT SCOOHL
 
 INNER JOIN 
    (
    $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT  NSOL 
    INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
    ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= NSOL.SS_CD
    )
   ON ( SCOOHL.LINE_ID = NSOL.SK_SALES_ORDER_LINE_ID_INT 
   AND SCOOHL.HEADER_ID = NSOL.EP_HEADER_ID_INT 
      AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOOHL.GLOBAL_NAME )       
 WHERE SCOOHL.LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
 ) STHLD_ORD_BK,
 
  (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD_KEY),0) MAX_ORD_HLD_SGK_VAL  
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD ) SMHLD_ORD_MAX
   WHERE NOT EXISTS
   (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE_HOLD SSOH
    WHERE SSOH.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT = STHLD_ORD_BK.SK_ORDER_HOLD_ID_INT
    AND SSOH.SS_CODE=STHLD_ORD_BK.SS_CD )
